pageContext.name: Levitating Death Eater Mask
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Enesco are excited to present the Levitating Death Eater Mask Figurine!  Standing at over 11' tall, the haunting vissiage of a Death Eater's mask floats magically over the stand.  Harry Potter fans, don't miss your chance to add this figurine to your Harry Potter collectibles display today!
